artifacts.summary: Deep logic analysis: axiom-free multi-family modal saturation approach (closure-based, 12-16 hours)

summary: Identified mathematically correct axiom-free path: closure-based modal saturation. Singleton BFMCS is mathematically impossible (requires phi -> box phi). Multi-family saturation via saturated_modal_backward (ModalSaturation.lean) provides axiom-free modal_backward. Recommended: closure-based saturation over TimelineQuot.
